collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (7 total Queries, 7 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `l`.`id` as `listing_id`, `l`.`title`, `l`.`price`, `l`.`address`, `l`.`state`, `l`.`type`, `c`.`name` as `category_name`, `u`.`is_verified` as `provider_verified`, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) as avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) as review_count FROM `listings` `l` LEFT JOIN `categories` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `l`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `users` `u` ON `u`.`id` = `l`.`provider_id` LEFT JOIN `reviews` `r` ON `r`.`listing_id` = `l`.`id` WHERE `l`.`status` = 'active' AND `l`.`review_status` = 'approved' GROUP BY `l`.`id` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC, `l`.`total_students` DESC, `l`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 5

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `l`.`id` as `listing_id`, `l`.`title`, `l`.`price`, `l`.`address`, `l`.`state`, `l`.`type`, `c`.`name` as `category_name`, `u`.`is_verified` as `provider_verified`, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) as avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) as review_count FROM `listings` `l` LEFT JOIN `categories` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `l`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `users` `u` ON `u`.`id` = `l`.`provider_id` LEFT JOIN `reviews` `r` ON `r`.`listing_id` = `l`.`id` WHERE `l`.`status` = 'active' AND `l`.`review_status` = 'approved' GROUP BY `l`.`id` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC, `l`.`total_students` DESC, `l`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 5
